H
WHY HILTON HEAD

Six Pillars of Excellence

What makes our island community truly unique

🌿
SUSTAINABILITY

Eco-Friendly Development

Thoughtful growth that preserves our pristine environment, wetlands, and maritime forests for future generations.

  • 60% of island is protected green space
  • LEED certified building standards
🏄
RECREATION

World-Class Recreation

Miles of pristine beaches, 20+ championship golf courses, kayaking, tennis, biking, and water sports.

  • 12 miles of beaches
  • Over 60 miles of bike paths
📈
ECONOMY

Economic Opportunity

Thriving business community with low taxes, access to capital, and a highly educated workforce.

  • $2.8 billion tourism economy
  • 160 new businesses last year
🎭
HERITAGE

Cultural Heritage

Gullah Geechee roots, historic sites, world-class arts scene, and vibrant local traditions.

  • Gullah Geechee corridor
  • 20+ annual cultural festivals
📍
LOCATION

Strategic Location

Just 45 minutes from Savannah and 2.5 hours from Charleston. Easy access via Hilton Head Island Airport.

  • HXD regional airport
  • Direct flights to 8 cities
🏡
COMMUNITY

Quality Living

Exceptional schools, low crime, beautiful neighborhoods, and an active, engaged citizenry.

  • Top-rated public schools
  • 14 neighborhoods with HOA amenities
GROWING TOGETHER

Economic Development & Opportunity

Hilton Head Island continues to attract entrepreneurs, investors, and remote professionals seeking a high quality of life with a robust business environment.

7.1%
Average annual growth
Our Business Development Team offers relocation assistance, permitting navigation, grant opportunities and more.
HILTON HEAD ECONOMIC DASHBOARD
01
Tourism & Hospitality
Core of our economy. Over 250 hotels, resorts, and vacation rentals.
02
Professional Services
Finance, healthcare, legal, and technology sectors expanding rapidly.
03
Retail & Dining
Unique shops, galleries, and over 200 restaurants island-wide.
EXPLORE OUR ISLAND

Signature Attractions

From pristine beaches and maritime forests to cultural sites and recreational facilities, Hilton Head offers something for everyone.

🏖️
Coligny Beach Park
Most visited beach on the island
🌲
Pinckney Island Wildlife Refuge
Over 4,000 acres of protected land
⛳
Harbour Town Golf Links
Home of the PGA Heritage Classic
Coligny Beach Park
A 12-acre oceanfront park with shops, dining, and activities
Open daily
Free admission

Gullah Festival

Ask our AI Concierge anything

Real-time answers about beaches, restaurants, golf tee times, events, and local recommendations.

🤖
Hilton Head AI Assistant
Online • answers instantly

Try asking: “What time does Coligny Beach open?” or “Best restaurants for seafood?”

Town of Hilton Head Island

Get in touch with us

Whether you're planning a visit, looking to relocate, or have a question about town services, our team is ready to help.
